videos.headline: South Carolina's Gerald Kilgore gets a pick-six
videos.description: Kentucky's Cutter Boley throws the ball too high for his receiver and Gerald Kilgore picks it off for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Carolina's Gerald Kilgore gets a pick-six) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Carolina takes fumble to the house after a bevy of Kentucky gaffes
videos.description: Kentucky's Cutter Boley is sacked and multiple Wildcats try to jump on the ball, but Jatius Geer is able to scoop it up and score a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Carolina takes fumble to the house after a bevy of Kentucky gaffes) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Carolina's LaNorris Sellers explains his mentality in win vs. Kentucky
videos.description: Sellers discusses his ability to scramble when defenses are playing soft coverages while also holding onto a ball to give to his grandfather following the win over the Wildcats.

videos.headline: Shane Beamer on South Carolina's ability to battle adversity vs. Kentucky
videos.description: Beamer expresses how proud he is of the Gamecocks and their resilience as well as responding to claims that South Carolina doesn't showcase "Beamer Ball."
